About OKas Grand

Delhi's Most
Prestigious Venue

Nestled in the heart of D-193, Pocket D, Okhla Phase I, New Delhi – 110020, OKas Grand is where extraordinary events come alive. From grand weddings to elegant corporate galas, our halls are crafted to transform every occasion into a lifelong memory.

Crystal chandeliers, velvet seating, LED screens, grand buffet corridors — we are Okhla's finest banquet destination.

Client Stories

Our Testimonials

Nitesh Kumar
★★★★★

It was great. The place has big underground parking along with valet parking. There are multiple halls there which I didn't know earlier. There were screens at multiple places which were displaying what event was going on in which conference hall.

P
Preet Shergill
★★★★★

Best experience, best decorations, awesome food with lots of variety, light on pocket and overall management was so good that during this unpredicted time of Covid, our function was conducted so well.

V
Vikrant Saxena
★★★★★

It was a pleasure choosing your banquet as our service partner for conducting an event. The ambience was great, food and service was good. Thank you for helping us make our event such a success. Special thanks to OKas Grand team!

R
Rouble Jain
★★★★★

The place is super beautiful and well equipped to host an amazing event. The staff is courteous and very professional. The food is to die for — always opt for the diamond package. Try it, you won't be disappointed.

T
Tarun Arya
★★★★★

We have had at least 10 functions in OKas Grand Banquet. All of them have been exceptional. Great service, awesome decor, very tasty food. Ample parking, valet parking available. The management is too good and very cooperative.

A
Ankit Singla
★★★★★

We had our Roka and Ring Ceremony here. Great services — banquet, food quality, décor — all at manageable cost. The team is very professional and extended support for DJ timings and extra usage. Highly recommended!

G
Geeta Rao
★★★★★

Beautiful decorations and good food. Very helpful and dedicated staff — everyone was perfect. Fully satisfied with the arrangements and hospitality. Will definitely choose OKas Grand again for our next function!

R
Rohit Joshi
★★★★★

Attended a birthday party here — great experience. Located conveniently, separate entry, no mall queue, valet available. Food from starters to main course was excellent. Neat ambience and quick staff. Highly recommended!

4.0
★★★★☆
